name: INNOVATIVE INDUSTRIAL PROPERTIES INC
business: Innovative Industrial Properties, Inc. is an internally-managed REIT focused on the acquisition, ownership and management of specialized industrial and commercial properties in the United States, primarily leased to experienced, state-licensed operators for their regulated cannabis facilities. The Company also has financial investments in the life science industry and intends to actively pursue acquisitions of properties within that sector.

exposures.sentence: We are an internally-managed REIT focused on the acquisition, ownership and management of specialized industrial and commercial properties in the United States. Our properties are primarily leased to experienced, state-licensed operators for their regulated cannabis facilities.

In addition to our cannabis-related real estate portfolio, we also have financial investments in the life science industry and intend to actively pursue acquisitions of properties within that sector as a key component of our growth strategy.

catalysts.event: Remaining investment in IQHQ Preferred Stock expected to be funded in multiple tranches commencing Q2 2026 through Q2 2027
catalysts.sentence: The remaining balance of the Company's committed investment in IQHQ Preferred Stock, which totaled $120.0 million as of December 31, 2025, is expected to be funded in multiple tranches commencing the second quarter of 2026 and continuing through the second quarter of 2027, subject to extension options exercisable by IQHQ REIT.

catalysts.event: IQHQ Credit Facility initial term of three years from September 30, 2025, with one-time extension option of up to 12 months
catalysts.sentence: The IQHQ Credit Facility has an initial term of three years from the closing date, with a one-time extension option of up to 12 months, subject to the satisfaction of certain conditions and payment of a facility extension fee.

catalysts.event: Revolving Credit Facility matures on October 23, 2026
catalysts.sentence: The Loan Agreement matures on October 23, 2026, and was most recently amended in November 2024 to increase aggregate commitments for secured revolving loans to $87.5 million (the Revolving Credit Facility).

catalysts.event: IIP Life Science Credit Facility matures on October 3, 2028
catalysts.sentence: Under the IIP Life Science Credit Facility, our Operating Partnership has a revolving line of credit available up to $100.0 million until the maturity date on October 3, 2028.

catalysts.event: Share repurchase program expires on March 17, 2026
catalysts.sentence: The repurchase program expires on March 17, 2026, and may be extended, suspended, modified or discontinued at any time at the Company's discretion.
At December 31, 2025, the outstanding principal balance on the Notes due 2026 was $291.2 million, which matures in May 2026.

tamClaims.claim: State-legal cannabis sales in the United States projected to grow from $31.4 billion in 2024 to $44.4 billion by 2029, representing a compound annual growth rate of approximately 7.2%.
tamClaims.sentence: According to BDSA, state-legal cannabis sales in the United States are projected to grow from $31.4 billion in 2024 to $44.4 billion by 2029, representing a compound annual growth rate of approximately 7.2%.
